pain_themes.description: Users feel overwhelmed by the sheer volume of support tickets, which leads to prioritization challenges and potential oversight of urgent issues.
supporting_quotes: too many sales, too many issues, too many escalation as the response were slow
we sometimes miss the high impact issue in pile of these ticket load

pain_themes.description: Current methods for prioritizing support tickets are manual and can result in misprioritization, particularly during high-pressure situations.
supporting_quotes: I try and look into top 10 tickets in my bucket and try and do manual assessment on priority based on impact
the consequences was that I missed a high revenue impact ticket

pain_themes.theme_name: Difficulty in Assessing Impact of Ticket Failures
pain_themes.description: Users struggle to assess the impact of issues reported in tickets, which can lead to further complications such as missing significant revenue-impacting tickets.
supporting_quotes: the consequences was that I missed a high revenue impact ticket

pain_themes.description: The process of summarizing and organizing information from support tickets is time-consuming, taking about 4-5 hours daily, leading to productivity inefficiencies.
During peak sales periods like Black Friday, the escalation of issues becomes overwhelming, putting further strain on resources and response times.
supporting_quotes: too many escalation as the response were slow

top_opportunity: Develop an AI-powered solution to automate ticket prioritization and summarization to manage overwhelming ticket volumes more effectively.
